arts.ttl: Milan to Try to Remove Real Madrid Hold over Youngster
arts.sum: Alex Jimenez is putting together a solid campaign, as, despite spotty minutes, he’s been convincing in multiple roles since joining Milan, and he was instrumental in the choral action that led to the late game-winner against Hellas Verona.
